input: text of learning materials (exercises and textbook content)
output: ranked list of relevant textbook content for a given exercise
backbone: semantic textual similarity (STS) using pre-trained embeddings (static, contextual, or LLM)
loss: unsupervised (no explicit loss; evaluation based on ranking metrics)
key_idea: evaluate and compare static knowledge graph embeddings, contextual PLM embeddings, and LLM embeddings for STS-based educational content recommendation
datasets: digital textbooks in Swedish (three subjects, two exercise types)
